name: exact_lookup_oracle_v2
notes: Expanded exact-lookup answer benchmark grounded in real local SQLite message evidence across docs, repos, X links, meeting links, handles, emails, and exact addresses.

entries.query: Where did I share the First Dollar case studies link?
entries.why: These messages contain the exact docs.firstdollar.money/case-studies link, either standalone or inside a richer explanatory message.

entries.query: Find the builder program Notion doc I shared
entries.why: These are the grounded Notion links for the First Dollar x Clanker builder program.

entries.query: Show me where I sent app.firstdollar.money after the call with @Inaaralakhani
entries.why: This message contains both the Inaaralakhani context and the app.firstdollar.money/docs.firstdollar.money links.

entries.query: Where did I tag @jackdishman?
entries.why: A clean exact-handle lookup.

entries.query: Find the wallet address 0xbC7B5142e390BBaABF8826dAE7E1ef9C609Df327 I sent with send 400 only
entries.why: This message contains the exact address plus the disambiguating phrase 'send 400 only ser'.
